name: Restlessness
image_description: The classical figure of Mercury dashes across an urban landscape. In the sky, the Sun is a compass indicating the ultimate in creative possibilities and the multitude of directions in which Mercury can travel.
personal: Mercury Arians are decisive and active thinkers, fond of debate and argument. Mentally, they tend to be competitive and impulsive, making decisions quickly and a little one-sidedly. With Mercury in this position, there is always a danger that one might have too many irons in the fire and thus waste a great deal of mental and physical energy. This card describes someone who is probably quite articulate and bases most actions on good thinking and logic. With a higher than average intelligence, people with this planet/sign combination have an ability to express themselves verbally, which will be important to them in any kind of achievement. However, natural curiosity and the ability to grasp quickly the essence of things leads to a restless existence and a need to constantly be on the move. Tiring quickly of project after project, people with Mercury in Aries are on an eternal search for new stimulation. Negatively, because of the sheer over-activity of the mind, the Mercury Arian is prone to irritability and temper, and has a need always to have the last word in any argument.
reading: When this card is drawn, it indicates a great need for the questioner to scribble down thoughts and ideas on paper; this could set the enquirer on the road to becoming a writer of some kind. The Restlessness card can sometimes suggest a long-drawn-out dispute, with much correspondence.
events: Research or detective work; competitive written work or discussion, taking up creative writing; a big argument; spontaneous communication, contact with the media.

name: Resistance
image_description: A statue of a bull made of stone remains rigid in a pose that is immovable and defensive. Behind, a shrub blows in the breeze and a parrot chatters meaninglessly. In the sky, the symbol of Taurus appears almost like another bird flapping its wings.
personal: For Mercury Taureans, thinking and decision-making are closely allied to the practical, material and common-sense. They often have an extreme preoccupation with business and monetary affairs. Such personalities tend not to rush into action on new or speculative ideas, and, in fact, are usually suspicious of concepts that threaten to change a present, comfortable situation. The Mercury Taurean displays acute powers of concentration and has a good mind for running a business or making things grow and grow. Mercury in the sign of the Bull can, however, indicate an extremely obstinate attitude. This personality type bases his or her set of values on things that produce concrete results. For Mercury Taureans, fly-by-night ideas have little appeal, and neither does wasteful chatter. This unflinching concentration on what is, to them, important gives such people an ability to ignore distractions and see only the tangible and profitable essence of a situation. This does not make such personalities mean – comfort and life's pleasures are always of importance to them – simply that the moneymaking aspect of a venture has to be based on sound reasoning.
reading: Often this card, when it appears in a reading, denotes a need to focus on financial thinking, and can be an indication that the questioner must look at accounting, economics or business advice. Alternatively, it may denote work in travel, transport or the media.
events: Drafting contracts, haggles over document wording, insurance policies; discussions about beauty or art; the need to take financial advice.

name: Excitement
image_description: On a prancing, nervous horse, a sagacious figure blows a great horn, the echoes broadcasting like rays across a cloudy sky. Behind, an old, venerated tower symbolizes past wisdom and achievements.
personal: Mercury is totally at home in the sign of Gemini. Here, in its natural sign, it describes someone with an excitable, agile and versatile mind: a personality type found in all kinds of media, teaching and publicity roles. People with this planet/sign combination have an intense curiosity for everything going on around them, and this gives them a sparkling pleasure in life, which is easily communicated to others. Capable of deep concentrated thought, Mercury Geminians are more likely to spread themselves mentally in order to learn everything about everything: an holistic approach to taking on information has more appeal to this character than dogged specialist research of one subject. This card describes people who show an interest in all forms of communication, the media, travel and social gatherings. They have a talent for writing and talking, and are most probably making a successful career in this area. This placing of Mercury certainly offers a great deal of originality and versatility to express.
reading: When this card appears in a reading, it usually indicates that the questioner will benefit from a period of busy, communicative socializing, with plenty of short trips related to the question. Negatively, the Excitement card can denote constant changing of the mind, jumping from one decision to the next with equal excitement and enthusiasm that annoys others.
events: A publicity campaign; a new subject for study; an opportunity to make a speech; an important decision, changing one's mind on an important issue; a busy social calendar.

name: Intuition
image_description: The three disks are symbols, representing the pentacle, the seal and the angel of the Moon. Floating above a starred cloud, a meditating four-armed figure holds two lotus flowers, symbolizing intuitive and inspired creativity.
personal: For Mercury Cancerians, thoughts and feelings are inseparable. This card describes someone who makes decisions based on current feelings, or on how he or she felt last time the situation arose – for people with this planet/sign aspect, past experience plays an important part in reactions to a current situation. Mentally and emotionally comparing life events in this way is a constant protective reaction. Mercury Cancerians are vulnerable to ideas or causes strongly based in the emotions, and respond completely intuitively to such situations. Much mental activity goes on in their homes, and it would be surprising if this character did not accumulate hoards of books. Mercury Cancerians tend to collect snippets of knowledge like a nostalgic filing cabinet, and once they are on the phone to friends and loved ones, phone bills soar. Despite the gossipy nature of people with this planet/sign combination, it often suggests a genuine talent for creative writing. The Cancerian influence also highlights an excellent memory, and indicates one of those lucky people who absorb and remember information unconsciously.
reading: When this card is dealt, it always refers to traditional family ways of thinking and ideas based on early childhood conditioning. The thoughts and comments of close family and friends will be of great importance to the subject of the reading.
events: History or events in the past, a revival of old memories, or a visit from a long-lost acquaintance; taking the advice of family or friends; study in the home.

name: Drama
image_description: A Möbius tube twines endlessly in a vision that defies and puzzles the mind. A great lion roars to draw attention to himself. The disk is a talisman with the pentacle to secure eloquence.
personal: The Mercury Leo is best with big ideas and big thinking, and has a splendid visionary mind, able to see things as they could be. Although not the best types to deal with final details, people with this planet/sign combination are excellent at seeing the future possibilities of a grand project, and setting the ball rolling towards its achievement. This card describes the intuitive and the artist planner. Mentally self-confident, Mercury lions form ideas gradually, and are not easily moved from them once fully formed. The need to be accepted as an authority in a field demands memorable presentation skills, and Mercury Leos have the ability to express themselves dramatically in speech and writing – and take great pride in this. This aspect bodes well for those connected with either show business or the theatre, describing an aptitude for game-playing with a bias towards intellectual versatility rather than physical prowess. Negatively, Mercury Leos can go over the top in speculation, and show off intellectually.
reading: Often when this card is drawn, it indicates pride in the intellectual achievements of children or young people close to the questioner. It can concern pushing those concerned to even greater efforts. There is always a flirtatious element surrounding Leo, and often this card reveals a brief affair more concerned with words than physical activity – love letters, perhaps.
events: An extravagant presentation, grand occasion; holding court, mental feats; a creative interest entered into with flamboyance; a love affair through correspondence.

name: Caution
image_description: A crowned woman – earth mother – holds her hand up to protect the mad rush of small antelopes escaping the feared jackals. Their sudden movements attract danger.
personal: The Mercury Virgoan has a sharp, analytical mind and good reasoning ability. Mercury rules Virgo and Gemini, and although happy in Virgo, it manifests in a much more disciplined way than in Gemini (see page 58). Here, its essence is orderly and systematic: people with this combination approach mental activity with care, and do not waste time on unclear or confused thinking. The Mercury Virgoan requires a smooth working environment, since distractions and niggling irritations throw the perfectionist off course. Work requiring acquired skills and specialized knowledge are more suitable for such people than a broader-based, scattered occupation, and the Mercury Virgoan likes to know the boundaries of each job well before starting. He or she usually displays a talent for writing and teaching – or at least the ability to pass on information. Mercury/Virgoans are methodical thinkers and have good manipulative skills; highly specialized mental work suits these talents. At work, as at home, this type directs much mental energy into sorting out the chaos of less-efficient folks.
reading: In a reading, this card usually indicates a need to carefully examine the pros and cons of a problem before taking any action: Virgo doesn't rush heedlessly into things. Although the card indicates a specialist, as with all Mercury contacts, it holds the potential for more than one skill to fall back on in an emergency.
events: Detailed craftwork, cataloging, a laborious task needing care and patience; restoration of order at work; a need to plan ahead.

name: Influence
image_description: The coiled serpent's tongue is the astrological sigil for the planet Mercury. It represents smooth talk, guile, persuasion and temptation. In the first relationship, Adam and Eve walk in the garden, unaware of danger. Beneath the roses, thorns.
personal: The mental expression of the Mercury/Libra character is primarily influenced by a concern with human interaction and close relationships. There is a delicacy about the Mercury Libran, who prefers the company of the reserved and cultured. Their innate curiosity about the workings of other people's thought-processes make Mercury Librans essentially sociable and friendly in outlook. Those with this planet/sign combination need plenty of healthy discussion and amiable argument to exercise their natural capacity for seeing both sides of any question. For them, ideas are best developed in brainstorming sessions with partners, where everyone's ideas are assimilated and developed together. Teamwork is undoubtedly the ideal mode of operation for Librans, and they find relationships most fulfilling when they are filled with good conversation and shared intellectual interests. Being able to see other points of view, the Libran has excellent arbitration and diplomatic talents. For this reason, people with this combination tend to gravitate to such subjects as psychology, public relations, sociology and law. Negatively, there is a danger that in constantly being fair to all, the Mercury Libran may find it impossible to come down firmly on one side of a question.
reading: When this card is drawn, it suggests that the enquirer should take a second opinion from a respected colleague about the present question.
events: Being tempted by others, a group venture, needing others' good advice; a renewed relationship that blossoms, the inspiration of a hero.

name: Extremism
image_description: A dramatic "penny-dreadful" style illustration of a struggling couple, man and woman, fighting over the contents of a letter. The words have changed everything. A crow shrieks at the scene.
personal: The Mercury in Scorpio card describes a deep, penetrating thinker, someone both intuitive and profound, whose sharp insights into others' motivation direct the thoughts. Such personalities are widely persuasive in argument. Typically, Mercury Scorpions are said to be secretive, and do not waste time talking unless they have something worthwhile to say. They command a great deal of respect, and are endowed with a magnetic personality that claims many followers. The ability to go to an extreme opposite position in order to understand the whole possibility of an issue makes such people good investigators and researchers. It also makes them capable of drastic changes of philosophy or beliefs, which can leave others up in the air with the last swing of opinion. For Mercury Scorpios, the supreme challenge is to solve seemingly impossible problems. The challenge of the impossible is so necessary that they often even generate mishaps in order to retrieve and overcome a situation. People with this combination display great interest in science and/or the occult: understanding life's secrets, whether purely physical or more mystical, is important to them. There is also a love of intrigue that makes for good detective story writers, journalist sleuths, and crime investigators.
reading: When this card is drawn, the questioner may face a total reappraisal of his or her life philosophy to overcome a seemingly unsolvable situation.
events: A violent verbal outburst; news of death; the solving of a great problem, discussion of a deep life problem; a drastic change of opinion.

name: Discovery
image_description: The mummy symbolizes history and knowledge, and the boat long-distance travel. Above the ocean waves a sun created from the globe.
personal: Mercury/Sagittarius people have the kind of mind that responds well to further education. In fact, their search for a personal philosophy and truth is continual. Mercury Sagittarians often have prophetic insight into public trends and opinions, and are consequently successful at playing hunches. This is a good aspect for people in powerful positions, such as politics and big business. Other people's attitudes are important to people with this planet/sign combination, and awareness of others' opinions colors the Mercury Sagittarians' major ideas and decisions. This card describes someone who uses his or her accurate ability to uncover and judge public views to contribute to their own successful exploitation of such views, thus making themselves popular. Though not always logical, they invariably say what they think – and mean it. Despite this honesty, Mercury Sagittarians rarely depart from conventional views, and their desire to remain popular is paramount. They genuinely like people and people like them. Travel is important to Mercury Sagittarians, who could spend time in another country, or in the companionship of those from another culture.
reading: When this card is drawn in a reading, the questioner may meet someone of this type who becomes an influence. Alternatively, the enquirer may find a need to develop by expanding his or her knowledge of the world.
events: A visit from someone abroad, learning a foreign language, planning a long trip; discovering a philosophy or religion, following a guru or mentor; involvement in politics.

name: Organization
image_description: The farm scene may seem to depict the simple life, but only a rigid routine and application to duty enables the tangible fruits of the labors to be achieved.
personal: Mercury Capricornians are shrewd, practical, organized and ambitious. There is always method in their thought-processes, and their instinctive ability to take things one step at a time makes for few pitfalls on the road to achieving ambitions. Such types always take a realistic approach to goals, and, rarely fooled by idealistic claptrap, opt for the slow but sure route rather than the fast lane. Such a conscientious and patient approach to organization needs to be balanced with a sense of humor – we all know the consequences of all work and no play. Despite this personality type's severe-sounding nature, humor is a common trait, and many comedians have this planet/sign placing. The Mercury/Capricorn type is prepared to spend time on education to achieve more professionally, and considers planning this important. People with this combination communicate well with the public, they could be successful and find recognition in politics and social or community work. Just as Mercury Capricornians require recognition and achievement, they also respect authority. Often this admiration, coupled with a desire to see tangible outcomes, can be taken to extremes, and involve name-dropping and the cultivation of the company of influential people to enhance personal prestige.
reading: When this card is drawn, it indicates that hard, conscientious work is required in order to achieve long-term aims or solve an immediate problem.
events: A need for extreme patience; discussion about discipline and control; taking a position of responsibility; working with someone famous.

name: Originality
image_description: The star and the bird in flight indicate hope and higher inspiration. The machine shows the complex reality that can evolve from the first transient flight of imagination.
personal: The thoughts of Mercury/Aquarius people are constantly open to new experiences and ways of seeing. Those with such revolutionary minds display an ability to be unbiased, truthful and objective. They have little time for traditional socially acceptable ideas that conflict with the facts or first-hand experience. The ability of such people to turn ideas on their head and see situations from a new angle produces flashes of inspiration and great originality. The Aquarian's freshness of thought owes a lot to the fact that little surprises him or her. People with this aspect read well and learn well, but above all, require good mental stimulation. The ability of Mercury/Aquarians to see ideas in the broadest terms leads to a great interest in humanitarianism, and an urge to seek a better life for all less fortunate people. Mercury Aquarians also display a constant interest in the innovative, especially new technology, and it is not unusual for them to have some ability in this field. A concern with scientific investigation is of paramount importance to this character type, and leads Mercury Aquarians into unorthodox disciplines that would worry more conservative beings. The negative aspect of this combination is eccentricity taken to the extreme, when ideas become so outlandish that there is no basis for communication.
reading: When this card is drawn, it demands that the questioner takes a lateral view and finds a new approach.
events: A new approach, an idea that necessitates drastic change; an unusual research result; a shock announcement; an invention/innovation.

name: Inspiration
image_description: A draped figure dances, one arm raised to the heavens, the other to earth in a linking of the spiritual and material dimensions. A Sun face with closed eyes shines palely above a stone building.
personal: The Mercury/Pisces combination indicates an extremely vivid imagination that finds it easy to visualize thoughts and ideas, and reveals a personality type with a natural ability to please others. Highly intuitive, almost telepathic on the unconscious level, people with this planet/sign combination have an imaginative talent that could be profitable in creative or artistic worlds – many writers and creative artists have this aspect. Poets, writers, or not, Mercury Pisceans have the ability to add imaginatively to the world around them. They arrive at conclusions through intuitive perception rather than logical reasoning, like a psychic sponge soaking up the feelings and thinking of others. Mercury Pisceans have a tendency to be secretive about their inner thoughts and ideas, and an excessive use of their natural ability to dwell on fantasies may lead to flights of neurotic escapism. Positively, they can put this ability to imaginative use if they dare share their imaginative thoughts with others. The combination of Mercury and Pisces produces a constantly fertile mind that can jump from one fantastic idea to the next with ease: ideal for storytelling or when one needs to tune into the thoughts and needs of others.
reading: In a reading, this card shows that there is an instinctive answer to the question if the enquirer will open up to his or her inner vision. It indicates that the questioner already knows the answer but refuses to face up to it.
events: Inspired writing, imaginative storytelling, inventing excuses, constructing a dream world, confused or wishful thinking.
